qualification.education_qualification: Graduate / Post Graduate degree from UGC recognized University
qualification.details: Graduate/Post Graduate degree from UGC recognized University. Preferably Retired Bank Officers (Scale II and above) with rural credit and branch exposure. Ex-Serviceman if no retired bank officer applies.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BOI Financial Literacy Counsellor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.bankofindia.co.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BOI Financial Literacy Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Financial Literacy Counsellor position at the Bank of India is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Graduate or Post Graduate degree from a UGC recognized University. Preference will be given to retired bank officers with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Financial Literacy Counsellor role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Financial Literacy Counsellor post is 64 years. There are no specific minimum age requirements mentioned for this contractual role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Financial Literacy Counsellor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Financial Literacy Counsellor post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 26,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the BOI Financial Literacy Counsellor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Financial Literacy Counsellor recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Financial Literacy Counsellor post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Financial Literacy Counsellor position will be based on an Interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their eligibility and experience.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Financial Literacy Counsellor position is a contractual role. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions specified by the Bank of India.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job location for the Financial Literacy Counsellor post is Kolhapur, Maharashtra, with the pincode 416002.

faq.question: Q10. Who can apply for this post?
faq.answer: Graduates and Post Graduates from UGC recognized universities are eligible. Retired Bank Officers (Scale II and above) with rural credit and branch exposure are preferred. Ex-Servicemen can also apply if no retired bank officer is available.
